findings.message: New redis-exporter service added with no corresponding Prometheus scrape job, alert rules, or Grafana dashboard. The exporter is deployed but not integrated into the observability stack.
findings.suggestion: Add a scrape job for redis-exporter to prometheus.yml targeting port 9121, create redis alert rules, and add a redis dashboard to maintain consistency with other exporters (postgres-exporter has all three).
